title: LIP01: Selectable
code:
<gds-list>
  <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable>
    <gds-icon-cloudy-sun slot="lead"></gds-icon-cloudy-sun>
    <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
      <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
      <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
    </gds-flex>
  </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
  <gds-list-item-pattern-01 selectable checked>
    <gds-icon-cloudy-sun slot="lead"></gds-icon-cloudy-sun>
    <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
      <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
    </gds-flex>
  </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
</gds-list>
